headline: Popular robotics company shuts down and liquidates all assets
summary: It could produce 100 customized pizzas per hour with one employee. It had backing from Paul Allen's investment firm. It partnered with Domino's. It raised more than $53 million over a decade. On May 11, Picnic executed a General Assignment for the Benefit of Creditors. In plain terms: the company ...

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Domino's Pizza (DPZ) After Its Recent Share Price Slump?
summary: Wondering if Domino's Pizza at around US$316.52 is a bargain or a trap? This article walks through what the current price might be implying about the stock's value. The stock has had a mixed recent run, up about 2.8% over the past week but down 13.9% over the past month and down 25.6% year to date, with a 33.0% decline over the last year and a 10.3% gain over three years. Recent coverage has focused on Domino's Pizza as a mature, widely recognized consumer brand, with investors weighing its...
